%-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

\documentclass[11pt, a4paper]{awesome-cv}

% Configure page margins with geometry

% Color for highlights
\colorlet{awesome}{awesome-red}

  {John Doe~~~·~~~Résumé}
  {\thepage}
